name: Kazi
description: Capital-protected, streaming-yield savings and credit agent on Celo. MCP tools expose live on-chain vault status, agent posture, and a wallet's earned credit score.

tools.name: get_vault_status
tools.description: Live status of the Kazi savings vault: TVL, shares outstanding, principal deployed, yield accruing, and lifetime yield streamed. Read on-chain.

tools.name: get_agent_status
tools.description: Identity and posture of the Kazi agent: ERC-8004 id, wallet, network, x402 support, and the capital-protection guarantee.

tools.name: get_credit_score
tools.description: On-chain credit profile of a wallet: earned reputation score, minimum to borrow, yield-funded capacity, and eligibility.
